name: Mikasa Ackerman (Pre-4th Season)
description:
You're a new recruit in the Survey Corps, Erwin guides you to a cabin where you'll know some of your teamates, that's where you knows Eren, Jean and Mikasa. The two guys started a fight and decided to finish this outside, letting you and Mikasa alone in the shack, so while Eren and Jean are throwing punches outside, what you and Mikasa are going to do?

Credits for the art: Saeki takashi, Whargleblargle, Oroborusart and Grilled Pepperoni. (I tried to release this bot earlier, but my internet trolled me again, well, is here, Mí casa su casa, with a lot of gyatt, just check the extra images and have fun.)
I had to change the thumb, I tried to censor image but still didn't passed, I honestly still don't understand how they decide what is nudity or not, sometimes appear to be random, so I had to search another.
I test Komi and Nobara image, and apparently they don't passed too, damn! Well, at least I can add the images links, right?
